maidBunnyBoss.0:
There’s really nothing special up ahead!
So there’s no need to go check it usa!
maidBunnyBoss.1:
Th-there’s nothing here, really! D-don’t come any closer!
I-I swear there’s absolutely nothing hidden here usa!
maidBunnyBoss.3:
...Usa!?
How did you find this place—!
maidBunnyBoss.5:
Usaaaa, you bastard—                        \w[45]
\{Are you here to steal my carrots!!       \w[60]\^
noBombFishing.0:
Fishing with bombs is strictly forbidden!
Do it at your own risk!
nekoTruck.1:
buy it!
Never mind…
Sneakily take it…
nekoTruck.10: There isn’t a wide enough lane!
nekoTruck.11: There are obstacles on the lane!
nekoTruck.12: The Chariot has been successfully summoned!
nekoTruck.13: The Chariot cannot be summoned in this area!
sela.1:
(Looks like she won’t be waking up anytime soon…
Guess I’ll come back later…)
sela.2:
…Hmm?
Are we… at the station already?
sela.3:
Huh? Wait—this isn’t the train car?
It was so warm just a moment ago…
sela.4:
A campfire… ah…
So that’s why it’s so warm.
sela.5:
But… that’s strange… Just a moment ago, 
I was still watching the river of stars outside the window…
sela.6:
I must’ve been too mesmerized…
And ended up missing my stop.
sela.7:
You’re asking what a “train” is…?
Hehe… a “train,” huh—
sela.8:
It’s that clattering, clattering thing that carries everyone,
shining as it glides through the stars like scattered diamonds~
sela.9:
Its whistle—
sounds just like a singing whale, you know?
sela.10:
Hehe, still don’t get it?
Then let me show you a ticket, maybe that’ll help~
sela.11:
The ticket for the Galactic Train,
is also very—
sela.12:
Huh? Huh??
The ticket… it’s gone…
sela.13:
That ticket with the black vine patterns and
the strange cross in the middle… it’s gone…
sela.14:
I’m sorry… I can’t show you the galaxy after all…
Looks like I lost my ticket…
sela.15:
Without it, I can never get back on the train…
Uuu… Uuu…
sela.16:
What will I do now…?  I guess I’ll just wait here…
maybe the next train will find me.
sela.17:
And also… I’m sorry…
the fire here is just too warm…
sela.18:
Once I sit down, the drowsiness washes over me…
like the tide… sweeping me away…
sela.20:
It really is warm here.
But… it’s different from sunlight.
sela.21:
Sunlight is the warmth of the “outside.”
A campfire… is the warmth of the “journey.”
sela.22:
…Hmm?
Is the train coming to pick me up?
sela.23:
Huh? Oh,
it’s you again, adventurer!
sela.24:
I was just talking to you earlier…
but it feels like such a long time has passed since then…
sela.25:
“Do I remember where I lost the ticket”…?
Hmm… not really… it’s all a blur now…
sela.26:
It’s not heavy like the coins in this world…
It’s light—lighter than a swan’s feather~
sela.27:
Its color looks like a ‘sleeping lake’ frozen inside it,
and if you hold it to the light, you can see stardust flowing within~
sela.29:
Maybe in a field full of blue sage,
or taken by a fearless fox back to its den,
sela.30:
or perhaps… it turned into the first drop of morning dew,
hanging from someone’s window ledge.
sela.31:
(Is this… a riddle?
I have no idea what she’s talking about…)
sela.32:
I’m sorry… the only thing I can recall,
are these… faint, hazy images…
sela.33:
Here... this is for you...
I used to love reading this back on the train too...
sela.34:
It’s filled with lots of... interesting notes...
I think it might be useful for you as well, adventurer...
sela.35:
(She’s focused on her drawing...
Better not disturb her…)
sela.36:
(I’m a bit curious...
What is she drawing…?)
sela.38:
(I think I just saw...
something I definitely shouldn’t have seen…)
PhilosophersFragment.title: Philosopher's Fragment
PhilosophersFragment.description50:
A special shard obtained from the Red Beast
If various shards can be collected
it might help improve ${}'s condition
PhilosophersFragment.description56:
A special shard obtained from the Maid Bunny
If various shards can be collected
it might help improve ${}'s condition
imoutoAhoge.1:
She didn’t seem to notice anything unusual, 
and it grew back quickly.
...Could this be some kind of renewable resource?
imoutoAhoge.3:
Since it seems complicated, 
I’d better not think too deeply about it.
imoutoAhoge.5:
\nl< >"...My head feels a bit itchy.   \w[30]
Did you do something, \str[121]?"
imoutoAhoge.6: "I-I didn’t do anything… I mean it!"
cookingSystem.0: \ii[\v[85]] is ready. What should I do?
inventoryExpansion.0:
It seems like using \ii[312]
can expand the backpack capacity...
inventoryExpansion.1:
Expand weapon slots
Expand gear slots
Never mind
loadingEasterEgg.0: \nl< >"Hamburg steak is the most delicious food."  \w[180] \^
loadingEasterEgg.1:
\nl< >"\str[121] will surely bring back 
a mountain of meat for his \str[120]..."   \w[360] \^
loadingEasterEgg.2: My sister seems to be saying something...
loadingEasterEgg.3:
\nl< >"But green peppers are the enemy.   \w[120]
\str[121], you have to eat them all…       \w[120]
Go defeat the green enemy~!"               \w[120]\^
loadingEasterEgg.4:
\nl< >"Ah, you’re awake…     \w[60]
\str[121], did you sleep well?"
loadingEasterEgg.5:
"Not really… By the way, 
I’ve been hearing some strange sounds 
for a while now…"
loadingEasterEgg.6:
\nl< >"Eh hehe, that was my    \w[60]
special bedtime help for you, \str[121]!"
loadingEasterEgg.7:
\nl< >"My sister is so cute...               \w[120]
She's my favorite girl in the whole world...  \w[210]
My sister is————                              \w[150]\^
loadingEasterEgg.8: My sister seems to be saying something...
loadingEasterEgg.10: \nl< >"Um... Did you hear everything I just said?"
loadingEasterEgg.11:
\nl< >"\str[121], your sleeping face 
was so funny just now~"
loadingEasterEgg.12: \nl< >"It's rare to see you dozing off~"
rubberDuck.0:
A lonely rubber duck 
floats on the water...
rubberDuck.1:
Pick it up
Leave it be
rubberDuck.2:
Did someone throw this away?
Looks a bit sad, huh…
rubberDuck.3:
Come to think of it…
I got washed down from upstream too...
rubberDuck.4:
If I take this home...
Would my sister be happy?
rubberDuck.5:
But it seems a bit dirty,
so maybe I should just leave it...
drowning.0:
Ahhh... that was close... 
I slipped from the riverbank and almost drowned!
mecha.0:
A strange mech, long covered in dust, stands here...
It doesn’t respond even when touched.
mecha.2:
A fallen part?
Looks like it could still be activated...
erohon.0:
(There are still people or monsters nearby...
better not take out this book.)
ninja.0:
I can’t believe there’s a man-made secret room in a place like this.
Who could’ve built it…?
ninja.1:
Whoa…!?
There’s even a girl passed out here…
ninja.2:
Now that I think about it, I’ve been hearing weird rumbling noises…
Was it her stomach making those sounds…?
ninja.4:
…………
Is she so hungry she’s barely conscious…?
ninja.5:
There’s a campfire here, perfect.
I’ll cook her something to eat!
ninja.6:
Should I just use \ii[\v[90]]     
and whip up something simple?
ninja.8:
Hmm… Maybe I should swap in
better ingredients…
ninja.9:
Hey~ I made some hot food for you!
Do you think you can eat?
ninja.10:
Sniff sniff… sniff sniff…
That smell… is it food?
ninja.13:
You… you little…
I made that, you know…
ninja.14:
(She finished it in just a few bites…
She really must’ve been starving…)
ninja.15:
Munch munch… You totally saved me!
I haven’t eaten in days… munch munch…
ninja.16:
I thought I was gonna turn into some hungry ghost
haunting this dungeon… Grrrr…
ninja.17:
Hey… just eat a bit slower… By the way,
why are you here alone in a place like this?
ninja.18:
Ah! So—!
I was seriously working on my mission, okay!
ninja.19:
I wanted to search for the hidden treasure in this area,
so I dug out a secret room in a secluded spot!
ninja.20:
But then… munch munch.
After I got in, the entrance got blocked by a tombstone!
ninja.21:
Ugh, I totally didn’t expect that,
so my rations ran out super fast… and then…
ninja.22:
A ninja running into a mess like this…
I can’t face the organization now…
ninja.23:
Huh… huh? But why’d you even
dig a secret room in the first place…
ninja.24:
Because that treasure doesn’t always show up,
so I had to be ready for a long stay… munch munch.
ninja.25:
Plus, I can’t let anyone else know about this,
this is a super secret mission directly from the boss!
ninja.26:
If anyone else finds out…
what do you think’ll happen…
ninja.27:
Of course, I’d have to quietly take care of them…
otherwise, I’d be a failed ninja… munch munch.
ninja.28:
…Wait, what?!
I totally just leaked intel!
ninja.29:
Um… I promise I won’t say anything…
so, uh…
ninja.31:
I can’t believe I messed up this badly again…
Ugh… even if you did save me…
ninja.32:
W-wait a sec!
You’re gonna kill me just for that!?
ninja.33:
That’s what being a ninja is all about…
You gotta fight to survive…
ninja.34:
I mean, I don’t really wanna hurt you, either,
but I still owe you a meal…
ninja.36:
Then there’s only one answer—
You have to become a ninja, too!
ninja.37:
If you join our group,
there’s no reason for us to fight each other!
ninja.38:
W-wait a second!
I don’t really have a choice here, do I!?
ninja.41:
You really do have a knack for this ninja stuff…!
You learned it all with just a bit of practice!
ninja.42:
Now,
you’re one of us, too!
ninja.43:
But I’ll have to wait until my mission’s done
before I can introduce you to the boss!
ninja.44:
At this point,
nothing really matters anymore…
